name: Barli Table Lamp - 25.25 Inch Height - TBL4415 - Antique White - Safavieh
description: Elevate your living space with the Barli ceramic table lamp. Standing at 25.25 inches, this lamp features a beautiful antique white finish that complements any decor. Crafted from durable poly materials, Barli offers a stylish blend of functionality and elegance. The intricate ceramic design enhances a room with a subtle yet eye-catching touch, making it perfect for any setting from modern to traditional. Whether placed on a bedside table or an entryway console, Barli creates inviting warmth and illumination. Discover the art of lighting with Barli, where classic aesthetics meet modern design.
